CreateTrigger.eventTypes:
List of trigger events. Valid values:
UPLOAD_CHART (Helm Chart push),
DOWNLOAD_CHART (Helm Chart pull),
DELETE_CHART (Helm Chart delete),
PUSH_ARTIFACT (artifact push),
PULL_ARTIFACT (artifact pull),
DELETE_ARTIFACT (artifact delete)
CreateTrigger.filters.value: Value corresponding to the filter type
CreateTrigger.name: Trigger name
CreateTrigger.targets.address: URL to be called when the trigger is fired
CreateTrigger.targets.headers:
Custom header information
Only `Authorization` is supported as a Header Key
